_comment: Task aggregate lifecycle. Realized as a pure transition function in crm.domain; the load-act-save loop runs in crm.app. Per-instance concurrency: LadybugDB optimistic version check on Save. A conflicting write is retried (persistRetry) up to MaxRetries with backoff, then rolled back (rolledBack). Terminal states (Done, Abandoned) are final and accept no further actions.

_delays.PERSIST_TIMEOUT: 5000 ms - LadybugDB write timeout before a persist attempt is treated as failed
_delays.RETRY_BACKOFF: ~200 ms exponential backoff between optimistic-lock retries

_ignores.complete: a task must be started before it can be completed

_ignores.start: the task is already in progress

rolledBack._exhaustive: prior is set by every setPending action to the state the operation departed from, which for Task is only Open or InProgress; terminal states issue no commands
